mapper.select: SELECT j.job_id AS jobId, j.fk_memberId AS memberId, j.fk_category_id AS categoryId, c.category_name AS categoryName, j.title AS title, j.work_type AS workType, j.career_type AS careerType, j.salary AS salary, j.deadline_at AS deadlineAt, j.status AS status, j.view_count AS viewCount, j.headcount AS headcount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_job_scrap s WHERE s.fk_job_id = j.job_id ) AS scrapCount FROM tbl_job_posting j LEFT JOIN tbl_job_category c ON c.category_id = j.fk_category_id AND c.depth = 1 WHERE j.fk_memberId = #{memberId} AND j.status != '삭제됨' ORDER BY j.job_id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_job_posting j WHERE j.fk_memberId = #{memberId} AND j.status != '삭제됨'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY j.job_id DESC) AS rno, j.job_id AS jobId, j.fk_memberid AS memberId, j.fk_category_id AS categoryId, c.category_name AS categoryName, j.title AS title, j.work_type AS workType, j.career_type AS careerType, j.salary AS salary, j.deadline_at AS deadlineAt, j.status AS status, j.view_count AS viewCount, j.headcount AS headcount, j.is_hidden AS isHidden,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_job_scrap s WHERE s.fk_job_id = j.job_id ) AS scrapCount,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_report r0 WHERE r0.target_type = 1 AND r0.target_id = j.job_id ) AS reportCount,
r.report_id AS reportId, r.fk_reason_id AS reportReasonId, rr.reason_name AS reportReasonName, r.process_status AS reportProcessStatus, r.created_at AS reportCreatedAt
FROM tbl_job_posting j LEFT JOIN tbl_job_category c ON c.category_id = j.fk_category_id AND c.depth = 1
/* 최신 신고 1건 */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT x.* FROM tbl_report x WHERE x.target_type = 1 AND x.report_id IN ( SELECT MAX(r2.report_id) FROM tbl_report r2 WHERE r2.target_type = 1 GROUP BY r2.target_id ) ) r ON r.target_id = j.job_id
LEFT JOIN tbl_report_reason rr ON rr.reason_id = r.fk_reason_id
WHERE j.fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND j.status != '삭제됨' ) WHERE rno BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT j.job_id AS jobId, j.fk_memberid AS memberId, j.fk_category_id AS categoryId, c.category_name AS categoryName,
j.title AS title, j.content AS content, j.work_type AS workType, j.career_type AS careerType, j.salary AS salary, j.deadline_at AS deadlineAt, j.deadline_type AS deadlineType, j.status AS status, j.view_count AS viewCount, j.headcount AS headcount, j.is_hidden AS isHidden, j.created_at AS createdAt, j.updated_at AS updatedAt, j.opened_at AS openedAt, j.closed_at AS closedAt,
j.fk_region_code AS regionCode, r.region_name AS regionName, pr.region_name AS parentRegionName,
j.fk_edu_code AS eduCode, e.edu_level_name AS eduLevelName, e.edu_level_name AS educationLevelName,
cp.company_name AS companyName, ci.company_type AS companyType, cp.ceo_name AS ceoName, cp.industry_code AS industryCode, TO_CHAR(ci.open_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS openDate, TRIM( NVL(cp.addr1, '') || CASE WHEN cp.addr1 IS NOT NULL AND cp.addr2 IS NOT NULL THEN ' ' ELSE '' END || NVL(cp.addr2, '') ) AS companyAddr, ci.homepage_url AS homepageUrl, img.file_url AS logoUrl,
rpt.report_id AS reportId, rpt.fk_reason_id AS reportReasonId, rr.reason_name AS reportReasonName, rpt.report_content AS reportContent, rpt.created_at AS reportCreatedAt, rpt.process_status AS reportProcessStatus, rpt.process_reason AS reportProcessReason, rpt.process_at AS reportProcessedAt
FROM tbl_job_posting j
LEFT JOIN tbl_job_category c ON c.category_id = j.fk_category_id AND c.depth = 1
LEFT JOIN tbl_education_level e ON e.edu_level_code = j.fk_edu_code
LEFT JOIN tbl_region r ON r.region_code = j.fk_region_code LEFT JOIN tbl_region pr ON pr.region_code = r.fk_parent_region_code
LEFT JOIN tbl_company cp ON cp.fk_memberid = j.fk_memberid
LEFT JOIN tbl_company_intro ci ON ci.fk_memberid = j.fk_memberid
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT f1.target_id, f1.file_url FROM tbl_image_file f1 WHERE f1.target_type = 'company' AND f1.filecategory = 'logo' AND f1.file_id = ( SELECT MAX(f2.file_id) FROM tbl_image_file f2 WHERE f2.target_id = f1.target_id AND f2.target_type = 'company' AND f2.filecategory = 'logo' ) ) img ON img.target_id = ci.company_intro_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT rr1.* FROM tbl_report rr1 WHERE rr1.target_type = 1 AND rr1.report_id = ( SELECT MAX(rr2.report_id) FROM tbl_report rr2 WHERE rr2.target_type = 1 AND rr2.target_id = rr1.target_id ) ) rpt ON rpt.target_id = j.job_id
LEFT JOIN tbl_report_reason rr ON rr.reason_id = rpt.fk_reason_id
WHERE j.job_id = #{jobId}
SELECT s.skill_name FROM tbl_job_posting_skill jps JOIN tbl_skill s ON s.skill_id = jps.fk_skill_id WHERE jps.fk_job_id = #{jobId} ORDER BY s.skill_name
SELECT category_id AS categoryId, fk_parent_id AS fkParentId, category_name AS categoryName, depth FROM tbl_job_category WHERE depth = 0 ORDER BY category_id
SELECT category_id AS categoryId, fk_parent_id AS fkParentId, category_name AS categoryName, depth FROM tbl_job_category WHERE fk_parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY category_id

SELECT sc.skill_category_id AS skillCategoryId, sc.category_name AS categoryName, s.skill_id AS skillId, s.skill_name AS skillName FROM tbl_skill_category sc LEFT JOIN tbl_skill s ON s.fk_skill_category_id = sc.skill_category_id ORDER BY sc.skill_category_id, s.skill_id
SELECT EDU_LEVEL_CODE AS eduCode, EDU_LEVEL_NAME AS eduName, SORT FROM tbl_education_level
SELECT region_code AS regionCode, fk_parent_region_code AS fkParentRegionCode, region_name AS regionName, region_level AS regionLevel, sort FROM tbl_region WHERE region_level = 1 ORDER BY sort

SELECT region_code AS regionCode, fk_parent_region_code AS fkParentRegionCode, region_name AS regionName, region_level AS regionLevel, sort FROM tbl_region WHERE fk_parent_region_code = #{parentCode} ORDER BY sort
mapper.insert:
SELECT TEST_JOB_POSTING_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO TBL_JOB_POSTING ( JOB_ID, FK_MEMBERID, FK_CATEGORY_ID, FK_REGION_CODE, TITLE, CONTENT, WORK_TYPE, CAREER_TYPE, FK_EDU_CODE, SALARY, HEADCOUNT, STATUS, DEADLINE_TYPE, DEADLINE_AT, VIEW_COUNT, OPENED_AT, CLOSED_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, IS_HIDDEN ) VALUES ( #{jobId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{memberId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{categoryId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{regionCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{workType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{careerType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{eduCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salary, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{headcount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deadlineType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deadlineAt, jdbcType=DATE}, 0, #{openedAt, jdbcType=DATE}, #{closedAt, jdbcType=DATE}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, 0 )
mapper.select:
SELECT j.job_id AS jobId, j.fk_memberid AS memberId, j.is_hidden AS isHidden, j.title AS title,
j.work_type AS workType, j.career_type AS careerType, j.salary AS salary, j.headcount AS headcount, j.fk_edu_code AS eduCode, j.content AS content, j.status AS status,
j.deadline_type AS deadlineType, TO_CHAR(j.deadline_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI') AS deadlineAt, TO_CHAR(j.opened_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI') AS openedAt, TO_CHAR(j.closed_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI') AS closedAt,
j.fk_category_id AS categoryId, c.fk_parent_id AS parentCategoryId,
j.fk_region_code AS regionCode FROM tbl_job_posting j LEFT JOIN tbl_job_category c ON c.category_id = j.fk_category_id WHERE j.job_id = #{jobId}

SELECT CASE WHEN lv3.region_level = 1 THEN lv3.region_code WHEN lv3.region_level = 2 THEN lv2.region_code ELSE lv1.region_code END AS regionLv1, CASE WHEN lv3.region_level = 1 THEN NULL WHEN lv3.region_level = 2 THEN lv3.region_code ELSE lv2.region_code END AS regionLv2, CASE WHEN lv3.region_level = 3 THEN lv3.region_code ELSE NULL END AS regionLv3 FROM tbl_region lv3 LEFT JOIN tbl_region lv2 ON lv2.region_code = lv3.fk_parent_region_code LEFT JOIN tbl_region lv1 ON lv1.region_code = lv2.fk_parent_region_code WHERE lv3.region_code = #{regionCode}
mapper.update:
UPDATE tbl_job_posting
fk_category_id = #{categoryId}, fk_region_code = #{regionCode}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, work_type = #{workType}, career_type = #{careerType}, fk_edu_code = #{eduCode}, salary = #{salary}, headcount = #{headcount}, status = #{status}, deadline_type = #{deadlineType}, deadline_at = #{deadlineAt}, opened_at = #{openedAt}, closed_at = #{closedAt}, updated_at = SYSDATE
WHERE job_id = #{jobId} AND fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND NVL(is_hidden, 0) = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_JOB_POSTING_SKILL (FK_JOB_ID, FK_SKILL_ID)
SELECT #{jobId}, #{sid} FROM dual
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_JOB_POSTING SET STATUS = '삭제됨', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE STATUS != '삭제됨' AND CLOSED_AT IS NOT NULL AND CLOSED_AT <= SYSDATE
UPDATE TBL_JOB_POSTING SET STATUS = '마감', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE STATUS NOT IN ('삭제됨', '마감') AND (CLOSED_AT IS NULL OR CLOSED_AT > SYSDATE) AND DEADLINE_AT IS NOT NULL AND DEADLINE_AT <= SYSDATE

UPDATE TBL_JOB_POSTING SET STATUS = '게시중', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE STATUS NOT IN ('삭제됨', '마감', '게시중') AND OPENED_AT IS NOT NULL AND OPENED_AT <= SYSDATE AND (CLOSED_AT IS NULL OR CLOSED_AT > SYSDATE) AND (DEADLINE_AT IS NULL OR DEADLINE_AT > SYSDATE)
UPDATE TBL_JOB_POSTING SET STATUS = '대기', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE STATUS NOT IN ('삭제됨', '마감', '대기') AND OPENED_AT IS NOT NULL AND OPENED_AT > SYSDATE
